english translation text: Peace be upon you O lord Bathd, son of its chief
Peace be with you O inheritor of the Kaaba after it had been founded
Peace be with you O fosterer of the messenger of God
Peace be with you O protector of the religion of God
Peace be with you O uncle of Mustafa
Peace be with you O father of the righteous Imams
Peace be with you O one who was blessed with a son, …
… the best of the born, the Imam of the Ummah and the father of the Imams
He is the divider of paradise and the fire.
He is the blessing of God on the good doers, and he is the punishment of God for the wicked
Peace be with you and with them, and the Mercy of God and His Blessings
